title: Cinna's Choice: Music Discs
description: A collection of music discs that include songs
body:
**_REQUIRES DISCO_**
 **_REQUIRES DISCO_**

[DISCO](https://modrinth.com/mod/disco)

- Mild High Club - Homage
- idkhbtfm - Choke
- Liana Flores - Rises The Moon

- Fools Garden - Lemon Tree
- Keane - Somewhere Only We Know

- KSI - Thick of it (COGNITOHAZARD)
- The Grateful Dead - Terrapin Station Medley

  **_REQUIRES DISCO_**
